LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FOSS MARITIME COMPANY'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO CONTRA COSTA IS GRANTED. THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED IN RICHMOND, CALIFORNIA, AND FOSS MARITIME COMPANY'S PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IS IN RICHMOND, CALIFORNIA. VENUE IS PROPER IN CONTRA COSTA COUNTY. (CODE CIV. PROC. 395.5.) ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-03-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, TRANSFERRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN R. HILLSMAN OF MCGUINN, HILLSMAN & PALEFSKY, TEL. NO. 421-9292 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOHN D. GIFFIN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF KEESAL, YOUNG & LOGAN, TEL. NO. 981-0136 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT FOSS MARITIME COMPANY'S Motion For Change Of Venue to Contra Costa is Granted. The accident occurred in Richmond, California, and Foss Maritime Company's principal place of business is in Richmond, California. Venue is proper in Contra Costa County. (Code Civ. Proc. 395.5.) Attorneys fees and costs are denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
